packages.name: 3 Amsterdam - 3 Bruges - 2 Brussels - 1 Maastricht - 1 Amsterdam
packages.description: Amsterdam's golden canals, Bruges' medieval belfry, Brussels' Art Nouveau grandeur and Maastricht's Burgundian charm on a self-drive through the Low Countries.

packages.name: 2 London - 1 Cheltenham - 1 Barnstaple - 2 Truro - 1 Plymouth - 1 Exeter - 1 Bournemouth - 1 London
packages.description: England's secret southwest — the Cotswolds, King Arthur's Tintagel, Lands End, the Jurassic Coast, Stonehenge and Windsor on one spectacular self-drive loop.

packages.name: 1 CPH - 1 Ferry - 1 Oslo - 1 Stockholm - 1 Ferry - 1 Helsinki
2 Amsterdam - 2 Paris - 3 Lucerne - 2 Venice - 1 Florence - 2 Rome
2 Lucerne - 2 Interlaken - 2 Montreux - 1 Zurich
cities: Montreaux. Hotel Helvetie | Eden Palace Au Lac

packages.name: 4 Rovaniemi (Helsinki pre/post), winter NY
packages.description: Rovaniemi at New Year — Santa's hometown, reindeer sleigh rides, husky safaris and midnight fireworks under the Arctic sky.

packages.name: 1 Reykjavik - 1 Akureyri - 1 Myvatn - 1 Egilsstadir - 1 Hofn - 1 Vik - 1 Reykjavik
packages.description: Iceland's complete ring road: Reykjavik, Akureyri, Lake Myvatn's geothermal fields, the Eastfjords, the Jökulsárlón glacier lagoon, Vík's black beaches.

packages.name: 1 Ajaccio - 2 Porto-Ota - 2 Corte - 2 Bonifacio - 1 Ajaccio
packages.description: Corsica's dramatic interior — the Calanques de Piana, Spelunca gorge, Restonica valley and the white limestone cliffs of Bonifacio on a self-drive circuit.

packages.name: 1 Zagreb - 2 Zadar - 1 Split - 2 Dubrovnik
packages.description: Croatia's Dalmatian coast: Zagreb's baroque centre, Zadar's sea organ, Split's Diocletian's Palace and Dubrovnik's city walls.

packages.name: 2 Oslo - 1 Flam - 2 Bergen - 2 Stavanger
packages.description: Oslo, the Flåm Railway, Bergen and Stavanger's oil history and Preikestolen cliff on a seven-night Norway circuit.

packages.name: 4 Reykjavik - 3 Akureyri - flight
packages.description: Reykjavik's Golden Circle and northern Iceland's whale-watching capital Akureyri in a seven-night fly-drive with an internal flight.

packages.name: 2 Oslo - 1 Flam - 2 Bergen
packages.description: Oslo's fjord city, the Flåm Railway through the Aurlandsfjord and Bergen's colourful Bryggen wharf on a five-night Norway classic.

packages.name: 2 Cagliari - 2 Cala Gonone - 2 Alghero - 1 Olbia
packages.description: Sardinia's wild east coast, the Gulf of Orosei's sea caves, Alghero's Spanish old town and the Costa Smeralda on a week-long self-drive island circuit.

packages.name: 3 Madrid - 3 Barcelona
packages.description: Three nights in Madrid's Habsburg quarter, three nights in Barcelona's modernist masterpieces — Spain's two great cities with a dedicated private vehicle.

packages.name: 4 Reykjavik
packages.description: Four nights in Reykjavik — the Golden Circle, the Blue Lagoon, whale watching and the Northern Lights on a regular FIT city programme.
